name: Chicken Teriyaki Dinner
recipeIngredient: 4 Skinned boned chicken breast halves each about 4 oz
Spinach and pepper saute (see recipe for this)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, whisk together soy sauce, mustard, sugar, and ginger; set aside.
2. In a large, nonstick skillet over high heat, toast sesame seeds until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Remove from pan and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, saute onion and garlic in oil until soft, about 5 minutes. Discard garlic clove halves if desired.
4. Add chicken to the skillet and pour the soy sauce mixture over it. Cover and simmer, turning chicken once, until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, prepare spinach and pepper saute.
6. To serve, place chicken on a platter. Pour sauce and vegetables over chicken and sprinkle with sesame seeds. Place sauteed mixture on the platter.
7. Garnish with scallion fan.
